core_mechanism: convex (positive-semidefinite) relaxation of a hard nonconvex quadratic/combinatorial optimization problem: the discrete problem is lifted to a matrix variable constrained to be positive semidefinite, yielding a tractable bound on the true optimum
brief_reason: The abstract obtains a semidefinite programming relaxation of the (quadratic-assignment-formulated) traveling salesman problem and compares the strength of the resulting bound to prior SDP and linear-programming bounds, which is exactly the machinery of PSD-lifting a combinatorial problem to bound its optimum.
